svg.text: HashiCorp RAG Pipeline — Detailed Ingestion Design
Cloud Workflows orchestrates Cloud Build · two parallel tracks · converge at GCS · import to Vertex AI RAG Engine
STEP 3 · CLOUD BUILD (E2_HIGHCPU_8 · parallel steps via waitFor)
Semantically split · metadata-enriched · GitHub blob URLs · product taxonomy
API Fetch Track (parallel with git clone)
Filters: no PRs · body ≥50 chars · updated ≤30 days
Fails fast on rate-limit · Secret Manager: github-token
BeautifulSoup HTML→MD · accepted-answer ordering · product_family · URL attribution
waitFor: process-docs, fetch-github-issues, fetch-discuss, fetch-blogs · content-hash near-duplicate removal
waitFor: deduplicate · writes metadata.jsonl to /workspace/cleaned/ · registered with RAG Engine at import
Versioned · 90-day lifecycle · uniform bucket-level access · all 7 source_types
ragFiles:import → chunk (500 tokens / 100 overlap) → embed (text-embedding-005) → vector store
validate_retrieval · vector_distance_threshold: 0.35 · zero results = WARNING (not failure)
Primes the RAG Engine vector index before first consumer query · followed by finish_pipeline log
